ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club owner */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club's stadium */,
  "club_value" REAL /* Financial value of the club */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field (e.g., GK, D) */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base annual salary of the player */,
  "total_compensation" REAL /* Total annual compensation including bonuses and incentives */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's agent */,
  "player_stats_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's performance statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_player_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_agent_id") REFERENCES player_agents ("player_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_player_stats_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_stats_id") REFERENCES player_stats ("player_stats_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_agents" (
  "player_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stats_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., GK, D) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract belongs to */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club that holds the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base annual salary specified in the contract */,
  "total_compensation" REAL /* Total annual compensation including bonuses and incentives */,
  "contract_version" INTEGER /* Version of the contract */,
  "negotiation_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract negotiation */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Additional terms and conditions of the contract */,
  "bonus_structure" TEXT /* Bonus structure for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
